site.title: Benjamin Nößler — Fullstack Developer · Vienna
site.description: Fullstack developer based in Vienna. I build web applications with TypeScript and NestJS. Available for freelance projects.

hero.headline: Fullstack developer based in Vienna.
hero.body: I build web applications with TypeScript and NestJS. Currently advising at Wien Digital, available for freelance projects on the side.
hero.availability: Currently taking on 1–2 projects · Vienna or remote

currently.label: Currently
items: Freelance development for selected clients on the side

skills.label: Stack
skills.body: Daily stack: TypeScript, NestJS, React, Next.js, PostgreSQL, Docker. Also comfortable with Angular, Java/Spring, Python, and Ionic. Infrastructure on Hetzner with Coolify.

contact.label: Contact
contact.heading: Let's talk.
contact.body: For project inquiries, collaboration, or just saying hi — drop me a message via the form or reach out on LinkedIn.
